name: @chantezy/cocos-bridge
description: Cocos Bridge MCP — bridges game design documents to Cocos Creator 3.8 engine implementation. 17 intent-level tools + 1 fallback, dual-channel (stdio + HTTP).
author: chantezy

scripts.check: node --check browser.js && node --check scene.js && node --check bin/cocos-bridge.js && node --check lib/config.js && node --check lib/server.js && node --check lib/tool-registry.js && node --check lib/tool-profiles.js && node --check lib/interaction-log.js && node --check lib/runtime-log.js && node --check lib/javascript-safety.js && node --check lib/path-safety.js && node --check lib/utils.js && node --check lib/generators/index.js && node --check lib/generators/project-scaffold.js && node --check lib/generators/config-generator.js && node --check lib/generators/component-generator.js && node --check lib/generators/state-machine-generator.js
